summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vehicles Module for CRM system. Backend APIs mostly functional with 92.3% success rate. Frontend UI working excellently with proper vehicle display, modal interactions, and lead creation form. One critical backend issue identified with lead creation endpoint.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when attempting to create lead from vehicle
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks lead creation functionality from vehicles page

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Returns paginated vehicle list with filters
working_endpoints.details: 50 vehicles total, pagination working, filters (source, make, price, search) functional
Shows total: 50, bySource: {copart: 27, iaai: 23}, price range with min/max/avg
Includes linkedLead field, all vehicle details properly structured

integration_issues.issue: Lead creation form submits but backend returns 500 error

working_features.details: Cards show images, prices, VIN, year, mileage, source badges
Opens on card click, shows detailed info, image gallery, create lead button
Shows 50 total, 27 Copart, 23 IAAI, $23,769 average price
Login works, /vehicles route accessible, navigation menu functional
Search input present, filters button functional, UI responsive

passed_tests: GET /api/vehicles with filters (source, make, price, search)
Frontend vehicles page loading and display
Vehicle cards rendering with proper data
Vehicle modal opening and displaying details
Lead creation form opening and UI interaction
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix POST /api/vehicles/:id/create-lead endpoint - currently returns 500 Internal Server Error. This is blocking the lead creation functionality from the vehicles page. All other endpoints and frontend features are working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (UI working perfectly, only backend integration issue)
